features: COOLS TIRED EYES: Gently refreshes irritated eyes strained from screens, lack of sleep or airborne irritants. Ideal for use after work, during travel or whenever eyes feel dry, irritated or tired.

SOOTHING CUCUMBER EXTRACT: The pads are enriched with cucumber and Vitamin E to nourish your skin and reduce uncomfortable itching and irritation. Use during your morning skincare or evening bedtime routine.
SKIN-LOVING VITAMIN E: Infused with vitamin E to nourish and hydrate delicate eyes. A calming essential while reading, bathing or relaxing.
RELAXING SELF CARE: Perfect for use in self care skin care routines. Adds a spa-like touch to bath time or quiet moments of meditation.
READY TO USE: No prep required – these pads sit comfortably over your eyes to leave you feeling refreshed, and they're biodegradable
FRIDGE-FRIENDLY: Store in the fridge for an extra-cooling effect. A smart way to wake up tired eyes after early starts or long nights.
description: Product Description Take a moment to relax, refresh and revive tired eyes with Nuage Cooling Eye Pads. Infused with soothing cucumber extract and skin-loving vitamin E, these soft pads are designed to rest gently on closed eyes, helping to reduce puffiness, ease irritation, and deliver a burst of cooling relief. Whether unwinding after a long day, recovering from screen time or enjoying a self care routine, these cooling eye patches create a spa-like experience from the comfort of home. Perfect for daily use, each pad is individually infused for maximum freshness and can be chilled in the fridge before use for an extra cooling boost. Simply place the pads over the eyes, relax for 10–15 minutes, then remove and discard. No mess, no fuss – just an easy way to help soothe and restore tired, puffy eyes. Each 10 pack provides multiple treatments, making it a smart choice for anyone looking to add a moment of calm to their everyday skincare. Ideal for use in a relaxing bath, before bed, or while meditating, these eye patches are a quick, affordable way to add a little peace and pampering to the day. Ingredients Aqua, Propylene Glycol, Cucumis Sativus (Cucumber) Juice, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera), Avena Sativa (Oat) Peptide, Trehalose, Hydrolyzed Sclerotium Gum, Xantham Gum, Chlorphenisin, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hyaluronate. Directions Remove any contact lenses and makeup before use. Place pads over closed eyes and leave for up to 15 minutes. Remove when finished. Discard used product, do not reuse. For maximum effect, store in fridge before use. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Manufacturer Contact Information Swirl Consumer Products Ltd, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. Swirl Consumer Products (Ireland) Limited, Block 3, Harcourt Centre, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, D02 A339, Ireland.
